name: Barbie
description: "Face" of [Barbara](https://anilist.co/character/200345/Barbara) who acts as a leader of the children's wing. The other "living dolls" are afraid of her harsh tone and personality.

nativeName: エレン・ミラ・メイザース
description: Reportedly she is the world's strongest Wizard who works for Sir Isaac Ray Peram Westcott personally and is often mistaken for being his assistant. She has previously worked for the AST by request of Sir Isaac Ray Peram Westcott. She has vowed to never lose to any opponent, even agreeing that she may go so far as to commit the atrocity of destroying the world in the process. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Geun-Tae Lee
description: Lee Geun-Tae is the general of the Earth Tribe and he is the husband of Yun-Ho. He serves under Soo-Won after acknowledging his strength during the Battle Game Festival held in Chi'Shin. Geun-Tae is a bearded, dark-skinned man who is almost never seen without a proud snarl on his face. He has brown almond eyes (yellow in the anime) and long untidy dark brown hair that he ties in a ponytail using a rope-like ornament with tassels on both ends. name: Gyoon Oh
description: Height: 180 cm (5'11'') Gyoon is Yohan's best friend, he works at Cafe Goyo. He can communicate using sign language. Due to bad experiences in the past, he is very reluctant to hire new employees. Facts: Likes Cha Ji-Hye. Hates just about everything else. His catchphrase is, "I'll bury you."

name: Haruko Hirukoma
description: Liliko is about twenty and has accomplished a lot in the world of beauty. She is a model, singer and actress but can´t handle a thing without her assistant Hada. Though almost everybody envies her she is nothing more than a visual lie.

name: Hikari Kuina
description: Hikari Kuina is a character first appears in the Beach arc and later revealed to be transgender. Originally, she specialized in Clubs, but after facing her troubled past with her stern father, she redefines herself as a Spades player.

name: Holly Kuujou
description: Holly Kuujou née Joestar is the daughter of [Joseph Joestar](https://anilist.co/character/6356/) and mother of [Joutarou Kuujou](https://anilist.co/character/4003/).

description: Ignis Scientia, previously known as Ignis Stupeo Scientia (イグニス・ストゥペオ・スキエンティア, Igunisu Sutupeo Sukientia?), is a companion of Prince Noctis. He is Noctis's close childhood friend alongside Gladiolus and Prompto, acting as an adviser for the royal family. He is the group's driver and chef, taking the wheel of the party's car unless the player wants to drive manually as Noctis.
